title: 6L Live PlmCasX Expression & Purification
author: Liz O'Brien
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8srhwd6

steps.title: Set up Pre-culture
steps.instruction: Set up pre-culture by either transforming plasmid into Rosetta cells or using a small amount from a glycerol stock (steps found below). Perform all steps aseptically, next to a Bunsen burner.

steps.title: Add LB Broth to Flask
steps.instruction: Add 200 mL, LB broth to a 500 ml baffled Erlenmeyer flask.

steps.title: Add Ampicillin
steps.instruction: Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 milligram per liter (mg/L) (add 200 µL of 50 milligram per milliliter (mg/mL) Ampicillin).

steps.title: Add Transformed Cells
steps.instruction: Add the entire tube of transformed cells to flask.

steps.title: Incubate Pre-culture
steps.instruction: Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .

steps.title: Prepare Main Culture Flasks
steps.instruction: Locate 6 glass or plastic baffled 1 l flasks and add 1 L, TB broth to each flask. Perform all steps in this section aseptically, next to a Bunsen burner.

steps.title: Add Ampicillin to Main Culture
steps.instruction: Add Ampicillin to a final concentration of 50 milligram per liter (mg/L) (add 1 mL of 50 milligram per milliliter (mg/mL) amp per flask).

steps.title: Inoculate Main Cultures
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL – 25 mL of pre-culture (grown in LB broth) to each flask of TB broth.

steps.title: Incubate Main Cultures to OD600
steps.instruction: Shake at 37 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm until the OD600 measurement is between 0.5 – 0.6 (roughly 3 – 6 hours). Be sure to blank spectrophotometer with cuvette of clean media.

steps.title: Chill Cultures
steps.instruction: Transfer TB flasks to be On ice .

steps.title: Induce Protein Expression
steps.instruction: Add IPTG to a final concentration of 1 millimolar (mM) to each flask ( 1 mL 1 Molarity (M) IPTG per flask).

steps.title: Incubate for Protein Induction
steps.instruction: Shake at 16 °C , 160 rpm – 180 rpm , Overnight .

steps.title: Prepare for Centrifugation
steps.instruction: Transfer cultures to 1L plastic centrifuge tubes and balance pairs of tubes by adding MilliQ H2O.

steps.title: Centrifuge Cultures
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cultures in a Beckman Coulter J6-MI centrifuge at 4000 rpm , 00:20:00 , 4 °C . Use blue sleeves to ensure tubes fit snuggly.

steps.title: Decant Supernatant
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant from cultures.

steps.title: Resuspend Pellets in Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL Lysis Buffer + TCEP to each plastic tube.

steps.title: Vortex until Homogenous
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes until sample is homogenous. Use a flat-top vortex.

steps.title: Transfer or Freeze Cell Suspension
steps.instruction: Transfer cell suspension to a 500 ml beaker. Alternatively, lysed cells can be frozen down for later use. Transfer to 5mL tubes and centrifuge at 4,000rpm, 20 minutes, 4°C. Pour off supernatant and freeze pellet at -20°C.

steps.title: Add Protease Inhibitors and DNase
steps.instruction: Add solution of tablets + PMSF + DNase to cell suspension.

steps.title: Keep Sample on Ice
steps.instruction: Place sample in tube of ice with water to hold beaker snugly.
